title: RHEL system tests: local rootless `not ok 209 |220| podman healthcheck --health-log-destination journal`
body:
### Issue Description

```
not ok 209 |220| podman healthcheck --health-log-destination journal in 1466ms
# tags: ci:parallel
# (in test file test/system/220-healthcheck.bats, line 415)
#   `count=$(grep -co "$msg" <<< "$output")' failed
#
# [20:41:33.386911107] $ /var/ARTIFACTS/work-rootless-localrzj644st/plans/system/rootless-local/tree/bin/podman run -d --name c-h-t209-ywoz6dmp --health-cmd echo healthmsg-9lXE1qtMcv --health-log-destination events_logger quay.io/libpod/testimage:20241011 /home/podman/pause
# [20:41:33.676183108] 3cdfbef7509337ae680c78229679736da527c433d0246cdba660fdb1fc138eb2
#
# [20:41:33.686302031] $ /var/ARTIFACTS/work-rootless-localrzj644st/plans/system/rootless-local/tree/bin/podman inspect c-h-t209-ywoz6dmp --format {{.Config.HealthLogDestination}}
# [20:41:34.014876123] events_logger
#
# [20:41:34.027271834] $ /var/ARTIFACTS/work-rootless-localrzj644st/plans/system/rootless-local/tree/bin/podman healthcheck run c-h-t209-ywoz6dmp
# $ journalctl --output cat --output-fields=PODMAN_HEALTH_LOG PODMAN_ID=3cdfbef7509337ae680c78229679736da527c433d0246cdba660fdb1fc138eb2
#
# # [teardown]
```
